settings.title: Competitive Edge
settings.description: The 300 GT introduces a groundbreaking combination of CONSPIT's proprietary technologies, built upon a race-grade carbon fiber lightweight structure. It integrates cutting-edge ergonomics, optimized control layouts, and unique interactive control-display feature, creating a new vision of practical aesthetics for sim racing.

settings.title: Race-Grade Carbon Fiber Structure
settings.description:
3D True Carbon Fiber Front Panel + High-Strength Aluminum Alloy Main Body in a precision interlocking design

1150g ultra-lightweight and rigid construction offers extremely low rotational inertia and high torsional rigidity, minimizing interference with force feedback details.

settings.title: 3D True Carbon fiber Front Cover
settings.description:
The front housing is crafted from T-300 carbon fiber prepreg, weighing just 43 grams and offering tensile strength up to 16 times that of carbon fiber composite injection molding.

12-layer prepreg lamination structure, utilizing the same Compression Molding Carbon Fiber Process proven in Le Mans-level racing.

settings.title: High-strength Aluminum Alloy Main Body
settings.description:
The rear housing is made from high-strength aluminum alloy, injection molded as one piece and CNC machined for precision.

Optimized for maximum rigidity, strength, and 222 grams lightweight performance.

settings.title: 110-Key Professional Controls
settings.description: The 300 GT supports up to 110 independent button outputs, fulfilling the needs of the most professional in-game controls and in-car adjustments.

settings.title: 8 Customizable RGB Buttons with Precision Feedback
settings.description:
500g trigger force + shock-absorbing silicone pad + clear rebound

Full-color customization, supporting lighting effects feedback control via CONSPIT Link 2.0 and SimHub.

settings.title: 2 ThumbClick™ Dials
settings.description: CONSPIT Exclusive Design: Ergonomically optimized for thumb use with triple precision tuning—diameter, resistance, and trigger feel—for enhanced control and reduced accidental inputs.

settings.title: 3 Dual-mode Knobs (+/- & absolute)
settings.description: These knobs feature a 12-position switch, allowing seamless mode switching between incremental (+/-) and absolute position via Conspit Link 2.0 software.

settings.title: 2 Encoder Dials with Remapping Function
settings.description: Each individual vertical encoder dial can be switched between 12 different +/- button mapping combinations, unlocking a wide range of in-car adjustment possibilities. For more details, please refer to the following Encoder Remap section.

settings.title: Encoders Remap
settings.description:
By switching the central knob ① to different positions, users can change the button mapping of encoders ② and ③, allowing for different in-game controls. 

For example: 
- In position 3, encoder 2 can be bound to TC1, and encoder 3 can be bound to TC2.
- In position 4, encoder 2 can be bound to Bias, and encoder 3 can be bound to ABS.

settings.title: Rear Shortcut Buttons
settings.description: Shortcut buttons on the back for easy control adjustments (e.g., ERS, differential preload) during cornering.

settings.title: Advanced Lighting System - 41 Fully Customizable LEDs
settings.description: Includes 8 button backlights, 9 RPM LEDs, and 24 rotary encoder position lights—all programmable via SimHub for race and telemetry feedback.

settings.title: 2.99'' Built-in LCD Display
settings.description: The 300 GT features the proprietary CONSPIT 2.99-inch display, offering 7 dash pages for vital telemetry display, with more pages to come in future updates.

settings.title: Display Integration with Encoders Remap
settings.description: The display integrates with the "Encoders Remap" function: providing real-time visualization of encoder button mapping (e.g., TC1/TC2→Bias/ABS).

settings.title: Professional Lighting Effects, 56 Fully Customizable LEDs
settings.description:
8 button lights, 12 RPM indicator LEDs, and 36 knob position backlight indicators, all customizable with user-defined colors and feedback effects

All lights are compatible with SimHub, allowing for the most comprehensive race and vehicle telemetry indicators.

settings.title: Magnetic Shift Paddles - Built to Endure
settings.description: Adjustable pressure with three options: 550gf, 660gf, and 900gf, allowing for tailored driving experiences.

settings.title: Dual-Clutch Paddles - Excellence as Standard
settings.description: Pressure and travel verified for the optimal control experience, with customizable dual-clutch, bite point and independent axle modes in CONSPIT Link 2.0, making race starts effortlessly smooth.

settings.title: Anti-Fatigue Grip Geometry
settings.description:
Designed for a full grip that eliminates hand fatigue efficiently, ensuring accurate tactile feedback during long sessions.

The core gripping area is optimized for both 2-finger and 3-finger lower grips, with a curved design that enhances force transfer and improves control when pushing with the palm.

settings.title: Quick-Con Adapter with Independent USB Connection
settings.description:
- Standard 70mm PCD adapter, ensuring broad compatibility with various options.

- Heavy-duty quick connector ensures stable, reliable connections.

- Comes with a detachable coiled cable featuring a direct USB connection.

settings.title: CDP Quick Release (Optional)
settings.description:
The 300 GT is optionally compatible with the CDP quick release system for direct connection to CONSPIT ARES wheelbase. 

It features a Formula-inspired CNC-machined 7075 aluminum clasp and ball locking design, with the clasp handling torque transmission and the balls ensuring precise longitudinal positioning. Spring contacts provide EMI-resistant electrical stability, outperforming wireless systems. Optimized contact geometry reduces ball wear, ensuring zero-play durability under extreme loads.
